name: AI Engineering
tagline: Ship reliable AI products and platform systems with evals, guardrails, and cost awareness

coreMetrics.name: Eval pass rate
coreMetrics.description: Share of release-candidate prompts, retrieval paths, and flows that clear the current quality bar.

coreMetrics.name: p95 latency
coreMetrics.description: How long the slowest normal requests take end-to-end in production.

coreMetrics.name: Cost per successful run
coreMetrics.description: Unit cost of a completed workflow after model, infra, and retrieval spend.
coreMetrics.target: Tracked weekly and trending down quarter over quarter

coreMetrics.name: Runtime incident rate
coreMetrics.description: Frequency of broken tool calls, hallucination escapes, and rollback-worthy regressions.
coreMetrics.target: Zero sev-1 incidents and a shrinking backlog of recurring failures

weeklyRhythm.activity: Review last week's eval regressions, launch blockers, and rollback notes.
Inspect latency, routing, cost, and tool-failure traces for the highest-volume workflows.
Ship quality changes behind evidence: evals, approval boundaries, and observability updates.

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: Update release gates, incident learnings, and rollback playbooks.
Refresh ingestion assumptions, stale-index checks, and citation quality.
Review model mix, caching strategy, and unit economics.
Choose the next high-confidence AI capability to build or harden.

whatToDelegate.task: Routine labeling, dataset cleanup, and documentation packaging
whatToDelegate.when: Once the workflow is defined and quality bars are explicit

whatToDelegate.task: Dashboard assembly and weekly metric snapshots
Integration scaffolding and internal tooling polish
whatToDelegate.when: When the product shape is already proven

whatToAutomate.task: Eval execution on each release candidate
